creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
flz         2009-11-16 16:29:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/banshee   Makefile pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    multimedia/banshee/files 
                             patch-src_Libraries_MusicBrainz_Makefile.in 
                             patch-src_Libraries_MusicBrainz_MusicBrainz_DiscFreeBSD.cs 
                             patch-src_Libraries_MusicBrainz_MusicBrainz_LocalDisc.cs 
  Removed files:
    multimedia/banshee/files patch-fix-startup 
  Log:
  - Various cleannups.
  - Re-enable the bpm-detection plugin (via OPTIONs).
  - Fix MusicBrainz so that Banshee can use Audio CD.
  - Fix and sort pkg-plist.
  
  PR:             ports/140570
  Submitted by:   Romain Tartiere
